title: Any changes for multi-threading since v4.204?
body:
We use verilator to simulate a large RISC-V core.

Previously we were using v4.204 and it can produce 16-thread simulator. However, when we upgrade to v4.210, it fails and says 
```
%Warning-UNOPTTHREADS: Thread scheduler is unable to provide requested parallelism; suggest asking for fewer threads.
```

Are there any changes for multi-threading since v4.204? Is it expected that the optimal number of threads is reduced for v4.210?
code_blocks: %Warning-UNOPTTHREADS: Thread scheduler is unable to provide requested parallelism; suggest asking for fewer threads.
